texts: An AI retreat — not a selloff.
Today: CPI 8:30 ET · ORCL after the close
scene: An elegant editorial financial poster, soft paper-white background with subtle blue-grey gradients and a faint circuit pattern in one corner. Big bold dark headline 'Close · Jun 9' top-left with a thin royal-blue underline, then the sentence 'An AI retreat — not a selloff.' as a sub-headline. Two clean white stat tiles for the indexes (Nasdaq red, Russell green). Below them a contrast pair: 'AAOI -17.2%' in red versus 'MU -1.4%' in a calmer tone, visually opposed (e.g. left vs right with a thin divider), suggesting carnage vs resilience. A slim footer bar with 'Today: CPI 8:30 ET · ORCL after the close'. Premium fintech aesthetic, generous whitespace, crisp sans-serif typography, red #DC2626 for losses, green #16A34A for gains, royal blue #165DFF accents.
